content_body: God has a way of showing himself and the wonders of his works. The mountains are simply beautiful. Waking up wach morning looking at the view it appears we are inside a perfect picture. We are thankful to God for the quiteness, peace and comfort that the mountains provide. Thankful for the priceless time spent with family. Our stay in this beautiful cabin was awesome!
title: Our stay in this beautiful cabin was awesome!
